target: Whole-machine term-unification sweep: one canonical name per concept, zero duplicated contexts, so main terms can be renamed cleanly. Registry: TERMS.md. Definitions: glossary.csv.

canonical.law: Machine law in agents/default.md; project layer in /.machine/ (agent.md, project.md single file, glossary.csv, personas/).
canonical.registry: TERMS.md at repo root is the canonical-name rename registry; glossary.csv is the single definitions source. Neither restates the other.
canonical.gitfs_branch: git-fs v3.1.2 creates gitfs/<sid> branches in .git-fs/ (verified on disk). 'agent/<id>' is stale wherever it labels a git-fs branch.
canonical.note: superpowers:* and plugin-namespaced skills are REAL (plugin registry) — not fiction. /oil and /mine are skills, not commands.
